title: hedysarum boreale var. mackenziei
intro: Hedysarum boreale var. mackenziei, also known as Mackenzie's Hedysarum or Mckenzies Hedysarum, is a perennial plant species in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to northern parts of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and flowers. The health benefits of Hedysarum boreale var. mackenziei include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
